action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2 still 0.303 from iter11 (hidden=768/4, select-on-r2_q, 50 epochs, clip[-50,50] in predict) with r2_q=0.076; current best.pt from 15-epoch retrain of similar config gives 0.232 with r2_q=-0.087 (val_r2_q=0.170). Time critically low (0.039h/~2.3min left, last train~10min). Analysis: Checkpoint overwritten so cannot recover exact iter11 model; negative q-r2 indicates outlier predictions on test dist-shift (R2 sensitive). Current predict clip[-20,20] too tight vs val maxabs(~23 for t-tend), iter11 used [-50,50] for positive q-r2. Curves show val plateau but selection on r2_q helped before. Decision: Update only predict.py to use clip[-50,50] + stats print (no retrain possible), submit_eval on current checkpoints/best.pt immediately (predict fast with bs=8192, fits time). This should recover positive r2_q and mean_r2 close to best.
